channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Omah Lay’s ‘Clarity of Mind’ Sweeps U.S. Afrobeats Songs Chart
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to this week's music update. We're looking at the latest from Billboard, and Omah Lay is making waves with his new album, Clarity of Mind.
[Soft music transitions in the background]
Host: The Nigerian singer-songwriter has scored a personal best, with 12 simultaneous tracks on the Billboard U.S. Afrobeats Songs chart. The chart, which ranks songs based on streaming and sales performance in the United States, has Omah Lay's "I Am" leading the pack with a No. 5 debut.
[Short music clip of "I Am" by Omah Lay]
Host: "I Am" was the most streamed song from Clarity of Mind, with 626,000 official U.S. streams in the tracking week of April 3-9. But that's not all - Omah Lay has three more tracks in the top 10: "Waist", "Don't Love Me", and "Artificial Happiness", which debuts at No. 10.
[Short music clip of "Artificial Happiness" by Omah Lay]
Host: This brings Omah Lay's total top 10s on the Billboard U.S. Afrobeats Songs chart to eight. And with 12 tracks on the chart, he's more than doubled his previous best weekly sum.
[Soft music continues in the background]
Host: Clarity of Mind, released on The KeyQaad/Sire/Warner, has also opened with 4,000 equivalent album units earned in the United States, launching at No. 8 on World Albums. This is Omah Lay's first top 10 on the World Albums chart.
[Outro music starts playing]
Host: That's all for this week's music update. Omah Lay is certainly making his mark on the music scene, and we can't wait to see what's next. Thanks for tuning in.
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
